text_body.plain_text: TAM Methodology | Navy budget is narrowed to average annual outsourced supplier opportunity

runs.text: TAM(FY) = Basic Construction base × supplier coefficient + incremental AP and LLTM.
Programs are computed separately; dollar outputs are summed.

text_body.plain_text: Sizing window FY2022–FY2027, nominal then-year. TAM(FY) = Basic Construction base × supplier coefficient + incremental AP and LLTM. Programs are computed separately; dollar outputs are summed.

runs.text: SCN and P-5c construction streams for DDG and submarine programs.

text_body.plain_text:
NAVY NEW-CONSTRUCTION BUDGET INPUTS
SCN and P-5c construction streams for DDG and submarine programs.

BASIC CONSTRUCTION STREAM
Primary new-construction budget base.

runs.text: Advance procurement and long-lead material; add only if incremental.

text_body.plain_text:
AP, LLTM, AND EOQ STREAM
Advance procurement and long-lead material; add only if incremental.

runs.text: Keep supplier-addressable work inside new construction.

text_body.plain_text:
SCOPE GATE
Keep supplier-addressable work inside new construction.

runs.text: Avoid double-counting dollars already in Basic Construction.

text_body.plain_text:
INCREMENTALITY GATE
Avoid double-counting dollars already in Basic Construction.

runs.text: Outsourced component work outside prime, co-prime, and GFE footprint.

text_body.plain_text:
INCLUDED SUPPLIER PATH
Outsourced component work outside prime, co-prime, and GFE footprint.

runs.text: Prime and co-prime self-perform; GFE and GFP; mission systems, weapons, nuclear plant, sustainment, design, services, and FMS.

text_body.plain_text:
EXCLUDED SCOPE
Prime and co-prime self-perform; GFE and GFP; mission systems, weapons, nuclear plant, sustainment, design, services, and FMS.

runs.text: AP and LLTM added only where outside Basic Construction.

text_body.plain_text:
ADDITIVE WHERE INCREMENTAL
AP and LLTM added only where outside Basic Construction.

runs.text: Already captured in Basic Construction; retained for timing and evidence, not a second numerator.

text_body.plain_text:
REFERENCE ONLY
Already captured in Basic Construction; retained for timing and evidence, not a second numerator.

runs.text: POP evidence converts gated budget base to outsourced supplier share.

text_body.plain_text:
SUPPLIER CONVERSION
POP evidence converts gated budget base to outsourced supplier share.

runs.text: Build DDG and submarine separately; sum outputs to average annual outsourced supplier opportunity.

text_body.plain_text:
PORTFOLIO SUPPLIER TAM
Build DDG and submarine separately; sum outputs to average annual outsourced supplier opportunity.

runs.text: SCN and P-5c Basic Construction with AP, LLTM, and EOQ stream logic.
POP-derived supplier-location share over gated, confirmed, non-GFE records.
Additive only where incremental; otherwise a timing and evidence lens, not another numerator.
DDG MYP reconstruction and additive AP; submarine nuclear exclusion and non-additive AP and LLTM; kept separate.
POP evidence is not the TAM numerator; FFATA-visible subawards are not full market size; total ship cost and TOA are context, not the denominator.
Supplier coefficient, MYP reconstruction, AP and LLTM treatment, scope exclusions, and program-specific stream toggles.

text_body.plain_text:
TAM method notes
Budget anchor: SCN and P-5c Basic Construction with AP, LLTM, and EOQ stream logic.
Supplier conversion: POP-derived supplier-location share over gated, confirmed, non-GFE records.
AP and LLTM boundary: Additive only where incremental; otherwise a timing and evidence lens, not another numerator.
Program-specific treatment: DDG MYP reconstruction and additive AP; submarine nuclear exclusion and non-additive AP and LLTM; kept separate.
Do not confuse: POP evidence is not the TAM numerator; FFATA-visible subawards are not full market size; total ship cost and TOA are context, not the denominator.
Diligence items: Supplier coefficient, MYP reconstruction, AP and LLTM treatment, scope exclusions, and program-specific stream toggles.

runs.text: TAM is the outsourced supplier-addressable new-construction dollar pool. It is not total ship cost, total Navy budget, visible award flow, demand forecast, SOM, capture rate, win probability, pricing haircut, or expected revenue.

text_body.plain_text: TAM guardrail: TAM is the outsourced supplier-addressable new-construction dollar pool. It is not total ship cost, total Navy budget, visible award flow, demand forecast, SOM, capture rate, win probability, pricing haircut, or expected revenue.

runs.text: Sources: (1) Navy SCN and P-5c shipbuilding budget justification, FY2022–FY2027; (2) DoD contract-announcement place-of-performance corpus; (3) program AP and LLTM bridge and assumptions register

text_body.plain_text: Sources: (1) Navy SCN and P-5c shipbuilding budget justification, FY2022–FY2027; (2) DoD contract-announcement place-of-performance corpus; (3) program AP and LLTM bridge and assumptions register
